class.name: ARBodySkeleton
class.brief_description: Provides joint transforms for a tracked body skeleton.
class.description: Contains the 3D joint transforms for a tracked body. Access joints by index using [method get_joint_transform] and [method get_joint_name]. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but returns empty/default values.

method.name: get_joint_is_tracked
method.description: Returns whether the joint at [param index] is currently tracked with reliable data.

method.name: get_joint_name
method.description: Returns the Apple-defined name for the joint at [param index].

method.name: get_joint_transform
method.description: Returns the joint transform for the joint at [param index], relative to the body anchor.

members.member: The number of joints available in this skeleton.
